final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a festive e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be vertical poster layout with clear visual hierarchy for headline and promotional messaging
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 brand identity as the focal subject, 618 anniversary sale theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a celebratory campaign atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, festive direction fitting a 618 大促 campaign — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (prominent), "周年庆" (secondary)
Constraints: must preserve brand name "绿联私有云" legibly; 618 numeral must be visually dominant
Avoid:
